top_signals.title: Treasury Department authorizes Iranian oil sales under 60-day license - CNBC
top_signals.summary: Treasury Department authorizes Iranian oil sales under 60-day license  CNBC
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: 'Reward for failure': Investor support for Target chair Brian Cornell falls to lowest level ever
top_signals.summary: Target chair Brian Cornell built the retailer into a $100 billion-plus giant, but recent struggles and underperformance have fueled investor calls for change.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Qatar Says Explosion at Ras Laffan Site Won’t Affect LNG Exports
top_signals.summary: Qatar said it doesn’t expect liquefied natural gas exports to be impacted by an explosion at the Ras Laffan industrial complex which left 13 dead and 66 injured.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Lucid to lay off roughly 18% of U.S. workforce, COO Marc Winterhoff leaves
top_signals.summary: Lucid Group is cutting its U.S. workforce by 18% as part of a cost-savings plan. It also said COO Marc Winterhoff is departing effective immediately.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Colombia Assets Rise as Market Favorite Espriella Wins Vote
top_signals.summary: Colombian assets rose after Abelardo de la Espriella won one of the tightest presidential elections in the nation’s history, setting the stage for a swing to market-friendly policies that have sparked rallies across Latin America.

top_signals.title: Op-Ed: Gabon’s Atlantic advantage — a new force in global potash
top_signals.summary: Gabon, with rich geology, ocean access, and rising infrastructure investment, is becoming a key player in the industry.
